title: Cobblemon Timed Global Shiny Boosters
description: A mod that allows players to temporarily change shiny rates in Cobblemon for set amount of time without needing to restart the server.
body:
Allows you to adjust shiny rate by the minutes. Currently you need to be OP to use these commands.



# Commands
`/getshinyrate`: Shows the current shiny rate. If non-default, shows the timer left.

`/setshinyrate rate minute`: For example setshinyrate 8000 60 will change the rate to 8000 for 60 minutes

`/addshinytime minute:` Add more time to the current on-going shiny rate change

`/defaultshinyrate`: Goes back to the default rate in the cobblemon config

After changing the shiny rate, any new pokemon spawn will take the new rate into consideration. If you `/setshinyrate 1 60` All the new spawns will be shiny for 60 minutes
